## Summary

-

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally for the affected area.
- [ ] Documentation is updated, or this change does not need documentation.
- [ ] Generated files are not committed (`dist`, `coverage`, `node_modules`, `*.tgz`).
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior is tested, or this change does not affect security behavior.
- [ ] Package metadata and public exports are updated only when intentionally changing the public API.
